examples: Her voice was shrill and penetrating.
More distinct came the shrill voice of Tinker Bell.
Imagine her surprise, when the White Rabbit read out, at the top of his shrill little voice, the name "Alice!"
Because Reich, unlike shrill Johnny-one-note Paul Krugman, is a master of the art of persuasive writing.
They were all too often only the shrill pea in the whistle of their possessions.
